mandatory_now.description: Required before the current stage can proceed.

optional_now.description: Useful now, but not required to proceed.

later_stage.description: Not required now; becomes mandatory only when a later stage or task needs it.

not_applicable.description: Not required for this project or task.

product_goals.needed_when: Always needed to avoid building without product purpose.

human_language.needed_when: Required for human interaction and human-facing artifacts.

artifact_language.needed_when: Required when generating specs, docs, user-facing text or reports.

ai_platform.needed_when: Required before configuring agents for a specific platform.

model_routing.needed_when: Required before assigning agents to models or optimizing cost/accuracy.

mcp_servers.needed_when: Required only when an agent must access an external tool or context through MCP.

repository_platform.needed_when: Required before repository operations, branches, PRs or commits.

task_management_platform.needed_when: Required when milestones, work items, tasks or project boards must be synchronized.

stack.needed_when: Required before technical planning and agent recruitment.

specialist_agents.needed_when: Required before implementation planning when generic agents are not enough.

required_skills.needed_when: Required before assigning work that depends on specialized skills.

database_credentials.needed_when: Required only when a task must connect to a real database, run migrations, inspect data, deploy, or validate integration.
database_credentials.safety: Never store credentials in repository files.

database_schema_access.needed_when: Required when planning or executing schema changes, migrations, queries or data validation.

deployment_environment.needed_when: Required when deployment, release, environment validation, secrets, CI/CD or runtime configuration is requested.

deployment_credentials.needed_when: Required only for real deployment or deployment validation.
deployment_credentials.safety: Never store credentials in repository files.

ci_cd_platform.needed_when: Required when build automation, pipelines, release or deployment tasks are requested.

security_constraints.needed_when: At least high-level constraints are required from the start; detailed secrets are not.

compliance_constraints.needed_when: Required when the project is regulated or handles sensitive data.

if_missing_mandatory_now.instruction: Tell the human which definition is missing and which agent should handle it.

if_missing_later_stage.instruction: Record as deferred and remind the human when a task requires it.

if_task_requires_deferred_item.instruction: Route the human to the owner agent before execution continues.

if_credentials_are_required.instruction: Ask the human to provide credentials through the secure mechanism supported by the selected platform. Never commit them.
